# Introduction to AI Course
> 30-day AI onboarding course by Wacky Works Digital

## About This Course
Introduction to AI is a comprehensive 30-day course designed for complete beginners who want to understand and use AI tools effectively. No coding or technical background required.

## What You'll Learn
- Days 1-10: AI Assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot)
- Days 11-20: AI Creation Tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, Runway, ElevenLabs, Suno)
- Days 21-30: Real-World AI Skills (Email automation, research, custom AI assistants)

## Course Features
- Self-paced learning on your schedule
- Hands-on exercises with real AI tools
- Official LinkedIn-shareable certificate upon completion
- Multi-currency pricing (GBP, USD, EUR, CAD, AUD, HKD, HUF)

## Pricing
- Standard Access: £49 / $59
- Partner Access: Discounted rates for corporate partners
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for organizations

## Who Is This For
- Professionals wanting to leverage AI at work
- Entrepreneurs exploring AI opportunities
- Anyone curious about artificial intelligence
- Complete beginners with no technical background

## Certificate
Upon completing all 30 days, you receive an official certificate that can be shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and other platforms.

## Company
Wacky Works Digital is a UK-based digital studio specializing in AI education, custom SaaS development, and workflow automation.
